requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Finland should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, fleet operator, public-sector project, or DSO-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under Finnish project or national requirements. In Finland, Traficom (Finnish Transport and Communications Agency) regulates radio spectrum and type approvals for radio equipment; relevant CE marking under RED (2014/53/EU) is required for equipment with radio modules.
summary.zh: 在芬兰，若充电点运营商、车队运营商、公共部门项目或配电系统运营商相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据芬兰项目或国家要求触发额外通信、频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。在芬兰，Traficom（芬兰交通和通信局）负责监管无线电频谱及无线设备型式认证；含无线模块的设备须符合无线设备指令（2014/53/EU）下的CE标志要求。
summary.zht: 在芬蘭，若充電點運營商、車隊運營商、公共部門項目或配電系統運營商相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據芬蘭項目或國家要求觸發額外通訊、頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。在芬蘭，Traficom（芬蘭交通和通訊局）負責監管無線電頻譜及無線設備型式認證；含無線模組的設備須符合無線設備指令（2014/53/EU）下的CE標誌要求。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — for radio-module-equipped chargers requiring CE marking
Traficom (Finnish Transport and Communications Agency) radio spectrum and type-approval requirements for radio modules where in scope

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Finnish operators, roaming, language (Finnish/Swedish/English), currency (EUR), and data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为芬兰运营商、漫游、语言（芬兰语/瑞典语/英语）、货币（欧元）和数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為芬蘭運營商、漫遊、語言（芬蘭語/瑞典語/英語）、貨幣（歐元）和數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module approval path, and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Finland configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific Finnish DSO supply point requirements. For Finland, additional checks include: (1) Finnish/Swedish/English language interface for user-facing displays and documentation; (2) cold-climate-rated SIM modules and communication hardware (operating temperatures down to -30°C or lower); (3) Traficom radio module type approval where RED applies.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终芬兰配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块审批路径，以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体芬兰配电运营商供电点要求进行审查。对于芬兰，附加检查包括：（1）用户界面显示及文件须提供芬兰语/瑞典语/英语界面；（2）SIM模块和通信硬件须通过寒冷气候额定认证（工作温度低至−30°C或更低）；（3）涉及无线设备指令的无线模块须通过Traficom型式认证。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終芬蘭配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑，以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體芬蘭配電運營商供電點要求進行審查。對於芬蘭，附加檢查包括：（1）用戶界面顯示及文件須提供芬蘭語/瑞典語/英語界面；（2）SIM模組和通訊硬件須通過寒冷氣候額定認證（工作溫度低至−30°C或更低）；（3）涉及無線設備指令的無線模組須通過Traficom型式認證。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or utility-linked chargers in Finland; EMC and power-quality evidence is expected where required by Fingrid, DSO, Traficom, tender, or site-owner specifications; RED CE marking mandatory for radio-equipped chargers
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Finnish networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, Traficom radio module requirements, and local communications requirements. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs. Finnish/Swedish/English language interfaces and cold-climate-rated communication hardware (-30°C or lower) are Finland-specific requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 芬兰联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量、Traficom无线模块要求，以及当地通信要求。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。芬兰语/瑞典语/英语界面及寒冷气候额定通信硬件（−30°C或更低）是芬兰特定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 芬蘭聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量、Traficom無線模組要求，以及當地通訊要求。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。芬蘭語/瑞典語/英語界面及寒冷氣候額定通訊硬件（−30°C或更低）是芬蘭特定要求。
